## Pull Request Preparation

Please confirm the following before submitting:

- [ ] Changes are made on a separate branch prefixed with `fix/`
- [ ] Only one commit, or commits are properly squashed
- [ ] Descriptive commit message provided
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`npm test`)
- [ ] Pull request targets the `staging` branch
- [ ] Pull request is not a duplicate of an open one

---

## Summary
Describe the UI bug, how it was identified, and how it was fixed. Mention affected role(s) and components.

## Related Issue
Closes #____ or relates to #____

---

## Checklist
- [ ] Reproduced the bug before applying the fix
- [ ] Fix applied and manually verified
- [ ] Tests updated to cover the regression
- [ ] All tests pass (`npm run test`)
- [ ] No new UI or accessibility issues introduced

---

## How to Test
1. Steps to reproduce the original bug
2. Steps to verify it is now fixed
3. Affected views or components

---

## Additional Context (optional)
Screenshots, logs, or reasoning if relevant.
